message:
fix: code quality — structured logging, Workers-safe show(), dead export, private field access

- master-do: add structured log() method, replace console.warn with this.log("warn", ...)
- client: DataFrame.show() falls back to JSON.stringify when console.table unavailable (Workers)
- query-schema: remove dead ValidatedQuery type export (never imported)
- local: add getExecutor() public method for pg-wire integration
- pg-wire/server: use qm.getExecutor() instead of unsafe `as unknown as` private field access
